genre_refs: WPA / vintage travel poster, Art Deco
description: A stylized illustrated poster done in the visual language of a 1930s WPA / vintage national-parks travel poster. The artwork depicts the Golden Gate Bridge rendered in flat, muted Art Deco color blocks (rust-orange bridge towers, teal-blue water and sky, tan/cream radiating sunburst rays behind the towers, rolling hills and clouds in the background). The composition is symmetrical. Top arched banner text in white reads 'RESTORE AMERICAN GREATNESS' and a bottom banner reads 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV' with a small seal. The tweet text reads 'Great Nations build Great Things. Restore Your Homeland's Greatness'.
